title: With A Nearly Intact Skeleton, Scientists Have Brought The Face Of An Ancient Human Ancestor To Life
description: After millions of years, Little Foot’s face is finally visible. But what does it really tell us about where we come from?

title: Hackers Have Hijacked Part of the Ancient Internet to Invisibly Deliver Scams
description: ARPANET. If you know your internet history, ARPANET was the forerunner of the internet. Dating back to 1969, it gave birth to the World Wide Web decades later. Far from being an obscure crumb of history, it lives on in ways that fly under the radar day to day. But the .arpa domain still underpins [...]The post Hackers Have Hijacked Part of the Ancient Internet to Invisibly Deliver Scams appeared first on VICE.
